titleEn: The art(s) of laser weeding demystified: laser expert Matthias Lautenschläger explains
titleZh: 激光除草技术揭秘：专家马蒂亚斯·劳滕施莱格详解
summaryZh: 本文通过激光专家马蒂亚斯·劳滕施莱格的视角，深入解析激光除草技术的工作原理、当前应用现状及行业热度。文章指出激光束已在金属切割、测距、土地平整和视力矫正等领域被广泛信任，但在除草领域仍被视为“黑箱”，存在过度炒作与客观评估困难的问题。内容适合对精准农业、自动化除草技术感兴趣的从业者阅读，帮助理解激光除草的真实潜力与挑战。
featuredReason: 激光除草是精准农业的前沿技术，与智慧畜牧中自动化、机器人应用理念相通，本文由专家解读，有助于行业人士理解该技术的实际进展与评估难点。
contentFull: The art(s) of laser weeding demystified: laser expert Matthias Lautenschläger explains 08-06 | Smart farming | ArticleLinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrintLaser expert Matthias Lautenschläger. Photo: Matthias LautenschlägerLaser weeding is currently an extremely hot topic with farmers, growers and contractors across the world. Literally as well, as the temperatures add up significantly.Laser beams are already part of everyday life such as cutting metal sheets, measuring distances, levelling land and correcting eye vision. We trust the technology without thinking twice. Yet when it comes to laser weeding, it still feels like a black box: mystical, (over) hyped and difficult to evaluate objectively. Future Farming wLinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrint René Koerhuis Precision Farming SpecialistMore aboutlaser weedingmachineryprecision agricultureweed controladLEARN MORERelated articles02-07 | NewsTersus GNSS AG993: Modular autosteer kit with built-in satellite correction fallbackPremium30-06 | Photo reportDLG Feldtage: hot, dusty and relatively quietPremium24-06 | ArticleAustralian vegetable farm puts 2 weeding technologies to the test23-06 | NewsRauch shows latest top-of-the-range fertiliser spreader at DLG Feldtage Buyers guides & Catalogues Subscribe to our YouTube channel Taiwan Smart Agriweek 2026Sep 8-10, 2026 TaiNEX 1, Tapei
translationZh:
激光除草目前是全球农民、种植者和承包商极为热门的话题。从字面上看也是如此，因为温度会显著升高。

激光束已经成为日常生活中的一部分，例如切割金属板、测量距离、平整土地和矫正视力。我们毫不犹豫地信任这项技术。然而，当谈到激光除草时，它仍然像一个黑箱：神秘、被（过度）炒作，且难以客观评估。
author: René Koerhuis
contentHtml: Laser weeding is currently an extremely hot topic with farmers, growers and contractors across the world. Literally as well, as the temperatures add up significantly.
